overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a desert shanty town on the outskirts of a futuristic city. The player approaches a makeshift wooden dwelling, navigates around its exterior porch, and enters a dimly lit interior room. The scene contrasts rustic wooden structures with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert shanty town approach with scattered makeshift structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through desert terrain toward wooden structures, passing an abandoned blue van

entered.detail: large red rocky cliff face forming the backdrop of the settlement
derelict blue vehicle parked beside the wooden shack
single-story makeshift wooden dwelling with weathered exterior
tall desert yucca tree with spiky leaves near the building
futuristic high-rise building with illuminated signage visible in the distance
red-topped concrete blocks placed on the dirt ground
wooden power line poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an open desert area with dry grass and dirt paths. A large red rock formation looms on the left while a makeshift wooden shack sits ahead. In the distance, futuristic skyscrapers contrast with the rustic foreground. The player passes a blue van and concrete barriers as they approach the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden building porch with patio furniture and covered walkway

events.description: ascends wooden stairs onto the covered porch of the dwelling
turns left toward the building entrance, passing patio furniture

agents.ego_description: navigating around the exterior porch, examining the building's entrance area and patio setup

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with weathered planks forming the entrance area
large white patio umbrella providing shade over outdoor seating
piles of wooden planks and construction materials leaning against the wall
boxy air conditioning unit sitting on the porch floor
two bright blue-green plastic chairs near a small table
small round metal table between the plastic chairs

segments.scene_description: The player moves onto a wooden porch with a roof overhead, creating mixed lighting of sun and shadow. The camera passes a white patio umbrella and turquoise plastic chairs arranged near the entrance. Construction materials and an AC unit are visible as the player circles toward the doorway, with the distant city skyline still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit bedroom with wooden panel walls and neon accent lighting

events.description: enters the dark interior room through a doorway, transitioning from bright exterior to dim interior
moves deeper into room revealing a green neon light strip on the wall

agents.ego_description: entering the bedroom and slowly panning around to survey the interior furnishings and layout

entered.detail: large bed with distinctive orange and black tiger-print blanket
tall wooden cabinet with multiple drawers and doors against the wall
wooden desk with office chair and scattered items on top
large round rug with abstract pattern covering the floor center
windows with horizontal blinds allowing slivers of daylight to enter
green glowing neon tube light mounted on the wall near the ceiling
wall-mounted shelf with books and decorative items above a dresser

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit bedroom with wood-paneled walls and a large tiger-print bed as the centerpiece. Natural light filters through blinds while a green neon fixture provides artificial illumination. The camera pans around to reveal a desk, wardrobe, and bookshelves, showing a lived-in space with personal belongings scattered about.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, arid desert landscape into the intimate, dimly lit interior of a rustic dwelling. It begins by traversing dry grass and dirt paths past a large red rock formation and a blue van, with futuristic skyscrapers looming in the far distance. As the camera approaches a makeshift wooden shack, the scene shifts onto a shaded porch where the bright midday sun gives way to mixed lighting among turquoise plastic chairs and construction materials. The movement then carries the viewer through the doorway and into a wood-paneled bedroom, where the open desert light is replaced by filtered blinds and a green neon glow. Finally, the camera pans across the lived-in space, revealing a tiger-print bed, a desk, and scattered personal belongings.
